commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Discord message search accept omitted guildId by deriving it from a Discord channel, normalizes channel targets, accepts query/content aliases, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +45, Tests +94. Total +139 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and v2026.6.1 require guildId before any Discord search fallback, and the linked issue includes live logs showing ToolInputError: guildId required. I did not run a live Discord reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This needs contributor/live-proof follow-up and maintainer acceptance of the fallback scope, not an automated code repair.
